name: Funding Partner
description: A Partner who introduces business owners to funding options through the Moonshine Capital ecosystem.
safePositioning: Funding Partners help business owners explore funding options that may be available based on business profile. Provider criteria apply, and approval, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed.
restrictedPositioning: Funding Partners should not guarantee approval, qualification, rates, amounts, timelines, or funding outcomes.

name: Referral Partner
description: A professional or connector who refers business owners when funding needs arise or when traditional financing is delayed, unavailable, or not the right fit today.
safePositioning: Referral Partners can introduce business owners to a responsible next step for exploring funding options without making claims about approval, terms, amounts, rates, timing, or qualification.
restrictedPositioning: Referral Partners should not present funding as guaranteed or imply that every business owner will qualify.

name: Affiliate Partner
description: A Partner who uses content, community, audience relationships, or digital channels to introduce business owners to Moonshine Capital resources.
safePositioning: Affiliate Partners can share educational resources and invite business owners to explore funding options based on business profile and provider criteria.
restrictedPositioning: Affiliate Partners should not use hype claims, guaranteed approvals, instant funding guarantees, or unsupported income and funding outcome claims.

name: Operator
description: An internal or external team member supporting Partner onboarding, asset management, resource updates, CRM hygiene, reporting, and follow-up systems.
safePositioning: Operators help keep Partner resources accurate, organized, and aligned with responsible funding language.
restrictedPositioning: Operators should not approve unreviewed claims or publish resources that imply guaranteed funding outcomes.

name: Broker
description: A Partner with commercial finance or deal-routing experience who may help identify possible funding paths for business owners based on business profile and provider criteria.
safePositioning: Brokers can help business owners explore possible funding paths. Approval, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed.
restrictedPositioning: Brokers should not promise specific approvals, rates, amounts, timing, or provider decisions before review.

name: Channel Partner
description: A future Partner lane for organizations, communities, or platforms that may distribute Moonshine Capital resources through structured channel relationships.
safePositioning: Channel Partners can help business owners access educational resources and explore possible funding options through approved workflows.
restrictedPositioning: Channel Partners should not present funding as automatic, guaranteed, or universally available.
